title.en: So it's worth taking a little risk, even at som...

content.en:
Ye Tian also expressed his understanding of the behavior of the five transcendent forces and many top great forces joining forces to deal with Zhan Tianzong.

Everyone wanted to go further, and those Dao Ancestors of the five transcendent forces naturally wanted to go one step further.

So it's worth taking a little risk, even at some cost.

"I'm afraid that this time, the Dao Mountain Realm will fall a large number of True Ancestors!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He wasn't ready to get involved, it wasn't that he didn't want to help the Void Heaven True Kingdom, but that he had offended the Zixia Sect now, if he participated in such a big war and involved the Zixia Sect, the five transcendent forces would be in complete trouble.

Besides, the five transcendent forces have enough confidence to fight this battle, it doesn't matter if he participates or not, if he shows the strength of the invincible true ancestor and leads the others, the other four transcendent forces may not be happy.

Because the more powerful he is, the more benefits he will receive.

Besides, he doesn't want to expose his strength at the moment.

Therefore, he was ready to give up participating in this matter and chose to guard the Void and Innocent Kingdom.

......

Void Heaven Temple.

The seven top True Ancestors, including the Moon Shooting True Ancestor, opened the meeting together.

At the meeting, the Moon Shooting True Ancestor said, "Not long ago, the Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor sent a message that he would not participate in this battle. The reason he gave was that he had offended the Zixia Sect, and he was afraid that if he dealt with the domain forces with us, the Zixia Sect would be involved. "

"If the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor doesn't come, we don't have the strongest True Ancestor in the Void Heaven Palace, wouldn't it be comparable to the two transcendent forces of the Forbidden Hall and Dao Mountain?" said another top True Ancestor with a frown.

"But if the True Ancestor of Wanfa doesn't come, I can't help it! Since he released power, he has hardly come to the Void Heaven Palace, it seems that we can't count on him anymore, we can only rely on ourselves!"

Shooting the Moon True Ancestor Dao.

In fact, if Ye Tian doesn't come, the biggest benefit can be taken by himself, otherwise the biggest benefit will belong to Ye Tian.

The only downside is that they don't have the Xeon True Ancestor in charge, so they are easily targeted by the Xeon True Ancestor, and there is no one to support them.

Half a month later.

The True Ancestors of the five transcendent forces of the Void Heaven Vein, the Star Horn Clan, the Chaos Life Alliance, the Forbidden Palace, and the Dao Mountain gathered together, and the other top forces also sent many True Ancestors over one by one.

Of course, not all the major forces were dispatched, and only 2 million True Ancestors were dispatched in total, and if it was apportioned, the True Ancestors of each force were not very many.

The major forces don't want to fight all their combat power in one battle, otherwise even if they gain a lot, the true ancestors are all gone, how can they protect their gains?

Among the 2 million True Ancestors, there are two Supreme True Ancestors, nearly 200 top True Ancestors, 200,000 Elite True Ancestors, and 1.8 million ordinary True Ancestors.

Such a lineup was enough to easily wipe out the Heaven Splitting Sect, and even the Battle Heaven Sect could hardly compete with so many True Ancestors.

However, they were also afraid that Zhan Tianzong would forcibly let Dao Ancestor wake up, in that case, they would suffer heavy losses.

Of course, they have also prepared a lot of hole cards to deal with various situations, even if there are big losses, they will not shake the foundation of the major forces.

can deal with a mere Heaven Splitting Sect, naturally there is no need for such a luxurious lineup of 2 million True Ancestors, once such a lineup is revealed, I am afraid that even the Zhan Tianzong will be too scared to send someone over.

Therefore, after the major forces discussed, they only sent tens of thousands of True Ancestors to the Heaven Splitting Sect, and the other True Ancestors secretly snooped, and once there was an accident, they forcibly descended on the True Ancestor army.

-----------

Sky Splitter.

Now there are only tens of thousands of True Ancestors in the entire sect, most of them are ordinary True Ancestors, and a considerable number of True Ancestors are promoted by the natives.

After all, the Heaven Splitting Sect was too weak, and it was already very remarkable to be able to survive some True Ancestors after shuttling through the Dark Forbidden Domain.

The entire Heaven Splitting Sect is now led by the Top True Ancestor Fengyue True Ancestor, and the Heaven Splitting Sect only has a total of three Top True Ancestors, which looks very miserable.

Of course.

Even so, as the top level of the Triple Heaven Forces, the Heaven Splitting Sect still has a background, and the ordinary Quadruple Heaven Forces have to pay a heavy price if they want to destroy them.

Now.

Fengyue True Ancestor was a little flustered, as if something bad was about to happen.

Suddenly, a True Ancestor came to report.

"Fengyue True Ancestor, I found a large number of True Ancestors close to our Heaven Splitting Sect!"

Hearing this news, Fengyue True Ancestor was a little panicked.

"Hurry up, open the Protector Array!"

Fengyue True Ancestor hurriedly said.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of True Ancestors from the major forces of the Dao Mountain Realm descended outside the Heaven Splitting Sect.

The Fengyue True Ancestor incarnation appeared outside the Heaven Splitting Sect, staring directly at the tens of thousands of True Ancestor armies opposite, and said fearfully: "What kind of accident did you guys have, why did you come to our Heaven Splitting Sect?"

Among the tens of thousands of True Ancestors, a representative came out, and it was the top True Ancestor Yuyun True Ancestor.

Yuyun True Ancestor opened his mouth and said: "You are the Fengyue True Ancestor of the Heaven Splitting Sect, at the beginning, your Heaven Splitting Sect forcibly awakened more than a dozen True Ancestors and killed too many True Monarchs of our major forces, and one of my bloodline descendants fell in that battle, today I am here to take revenge!"

Yuyun True Ancestor's words were true, one of his bloodline descendants did fall in that battle, but that bloodline descendant had a very distant relationship with him, and he hadn't even seen it.

But in any case, this is an excuse, an excuse to be able to make a move out of the Heaven-Splitting Sect.

"You guys are embarrassed to say this, if you hadn't attacked our Heaven Splitting Sect Mountain Gate, wouldn't we have forcibly sent a dozen Forbidden Domain disciples, you just fell some True Monarchs, but our Heaven Splitting Sect has lost a lot of resources, as well as the lives of more than a dozen True Ancestors!" Fengyue True Ancestor said angrily.

However, Yuyun True Ancestor retorted: "Those True Monarchs who have fallen are all geniuses of the major forces, and all of them have the hope of impacting the True Ancestor, if they are still alive now, I am afraid that tens of thousands of True Ancestors could have been born long ago!"

"You guys are being unreasonable!"

Fengyue True Ancestor roared angrily.

Yuyun True Ancestor pressed forward step by step, and threatened in a cold voice: "I will give you two choices for the Heaven Splitting Sect today, one is to apologize, hand over all the inheritances and treasures of S, and the other is to destroy the door!"

"Are you really going to threaten our Sky Splitting Sect?"

Fengyue True Ancestor's eyes were cold and he asked.

"Seriously!"

Yuyun True Ancestor responded.

"Okay, well, then I'm going to see how you destroy our Heaven Splitting Sect today!"

While Fengyue True Ancestor spoke, he had already sent a message to Zhan Tianzong.

After all, they were one of the sects under the command of the Zhan Tian Sect, and they were protected by the Zhan Tian Sect.

The other side.

After Zhan Tianzong got the news, he hurriedly led tens of thousands of true ancestors to rush over, although the quantity was not much, but the quality was high!

Among these tens of thousands of True Ancestors, there are ten top True Ancestors, and all the others are Elite True Ancestors, such a force is enough to protect the Heaven Splitting Sect.

Bang!!!!!

The fight has begun!

Tens of thousands of True Ancestors attacked the Heaven Splitting Sect's Great Array in unison, and no matter how strong the Great Array was, it was difficult to stop this tens of thousands of True Ancestor troops, so the True Ancestors of the Heaven Splitting Sect joined the battlefield and fought with tens of thousands of True Ancestor troops.

At this time, the Heaven Splitting Sect used all kinds of hole card killing weapons at all costs, just to kill more True Ancestors.

But the Heaven Splitting Sect does not have an advantage in numbers, nor does the top True Ancestor have an advantage, and there are six top True Ancestors among the tens of thousands of True Ancestors.

Therefore, the Heaven Splitting Sect was completely at a disadvantage, with more and more True Ancestors falling, while there were very few True Ancestors who had fallen by the major forces, and only a few unlucky True Ancestors had been killed.

"Damn, as soon as the reinforcements from the Zhan Tianzong arrive, you will all die!"

Fengyue True Ancestor thought secretly while resisting the siege of several top True Ancestors.

As time passed, the battle became more and more intense.

Suddenly.

The void cracked, and the reinforcements from the Zhan Tian Sect arrived.

"If you dare to invade the Heaven Splitting Sect, you will seek death!"

One of the top True Ancestors of the Battle Heaven Sect, the Heavenly True Ancestor, said coldly.

I saw that the Ten Thousand True Ancestors of the Zhan Tian Sect had descended, and the situation was reversed all of a sudden.

Surreptitiously.

Shooting Moon True Ancestor and a group of other True Ancestors glanced at each other and said, "It's time for us to play!"

The dense True Ancestors tore through the space and descended, occupying the void of the Heaven Splitting Sect in a short time.

This time, hundreds of thousands of True Monarchs descended, and such a huge number made the True Ancestors of the Heaven Splitting Sect and the Battle Heaven Sect completely dumbfounded.

"Zhan Tian Sect, you dare to help the Heaven Splitting Sect kill our true ancestor, and today our major forces will fight with you Zhan Tian Sect endlessly!"

The Forbidden Palace's strongest true ancestor, the Blood Jade True Ancestor, spoke.

Kill!

Hundreds of thousands of True Ancestors slaughtered the True Ancestors of the Heaven Splitting Sect and the Battle Heaven Sect, this was not a fight, but a slaughter.

Fengyue True Ancestor wanted to escape, but was pierced by an arrow from the Moon Shooting True Ancestor, and then was crushed by the Blood Jade True Ancestor, and fell and died on the spot.

I saw that the True Ancestors of the Heaven Splitting Sect and the Battle Heaven Sect had fallen, and even the top True Ancestors could not resist the siege of many top True Ancestors, and they soon fell and died one by one.

"You guys are a conspiracy!!! just because you also want to deal with our Zhan Tianzong, don't think about it!"

The Deceptive True Ancestor roared angrily before he died.
